name: CastCrew
description: Adds a Cast & Crew module to the Jellyfin sidebar for browsing actors, directors, producers, and other crew members.
overview: Browse actors, directors, and producers in a dedicated Cast & Crew page within Jellyfin Web.

versions.changelog: Try to fix the issue that the plugin does not work on windows installer based jellyfin round 3.
Try to fix the issue that the plugin does not work on windows installer based jellyfin round 3.
